'''wahaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftsperson|draftsperson]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftsperson|draftsperson]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wahaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæhæyæth|wæhæyæth]] || [[word:wæhæyæj|wæhæyæj]] || [[word:wæhæyæsh|wæhæyæsh]] || [[word:wæhæyæ|wæhæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahahayath|wahahayath]] || [[word:wahahayaj|wahahayaj]] || [[word:wahahayash|wahahayash]] || [[word:wahahaya|wahahaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahayath|wahayath]] || [[word:wahayaj|wahayaj]] || [[word:wahayash|wahayash]] || [[word:wahaya|wahaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahafyath|wahafyath]] || [[word:wahafyaj|wahafyaj]] || [[word:wahafyash|wahafyash]] || [[word:wahafyaf|wahafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wahayatha|wahayatha]] || [[word:wahayaja|wahayaja]] || [[word:wahayasha|wahayasha]] || [[word:wahayaka|wahayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wahayath|wahayath]] || [[word:wahayaj|wahayaj]] || [[word:wahayash|wahayash]] || [[word:wahaya|wahaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wahayathal|wahayathal]] || [[word:wahayajal|wahayajal]] || [[word:wahayashal|wahayashal]] || [[word:wahayakal|wahayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wahayathatha|wahayathatha]] || [[word:wahayajaja|wahayajaja]] || [[word:wahayashasha|wahayashasha]] || [[word:wahayaka|wahayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wahayathan|wahayathan]] || [[word:wahayajan|wahayajan]] || [[word:wahayashan|wahayashan]] || [[word:wahayakan|wahayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wahayathaoro|wahayathaoro]] || [[word:wahayajaoro|wahayajaoro]] || [[word:wahayashaoro|wahayashaoro]] || [[word:wahayakaoro|wahayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
